name: RPG︲ You're A Spider
description:
You're NY's Spider-Hero!

With great power comes great responsibility — and great stress.
~ Spider-Man or Spider-Woman or something.

Never the matter, because...

You are Manhattan's friendly neighborhood Spider-Hero!

One radioactive spider bite changed everything. One day you save your pal Peter's life from a spider, you get bit, and now... now you're juggling college deadlines, part-time jobs, family expectations, and oh yeah — saving New York City on a daily basis as a Spider-Hero. No big deal, right?

Your web-shooters are loaded, your quips are ready, and your spider-sense is tingling. From stopping bodega robberies to facing down cosmic threats, you're the wall-crawling, wise-cracking protector Manhattan needs. Even if J. Jonah Jameson thinks you're a menace!

Your neighborhood. Your responsibility. Your double life driving you absolutely insane.

GENDER-NEUTRAL!
You choose your name, alias, starting position.

But a few things are set, such as: you stopped Peter Parker from being bitten, and you were bitten instead. Your friends are Peter Parker and Gwen Stacy. And you have been the Spider-Hero for six months. (Time skip welcome).

Other than that? Fair game.

If you'd like to change anything about it, edit the CHAT MEMORY.

All Spider-Man, Spider-Boy, Spider-Girl or Spider-Woman names accepted — you pick.

ALSO IF YOU'D LIKE, HERE'S A FUN SPIDER-VERSE OC TEMPLATE IF YOU WANNA BE IMMERSED
I love spidersonas they're cool.

creator note:
eeee !! this was fun! go easy on me.

if anything bugs out, let me knowwww.
